finding_results.notes: Recast the two academic slips into Gavin-sized language by grounding the distinction in his own paint-and-wall analogy and replacing the abstract recursive phrasing with plain, circular logic.

Varied the repeated emphasis pattern across the breakthrough beat: the object/agreement moment now lands through a concrete image, the visibility description uses a single compressed negation instead of a ladder, the pain beat shifts to bodily pressure, and the emotional aftermath no longer repeats the not-X/not-Y structure.

summary: The revision keeps Chapter 11's breakthrough intact while tightening Gavin's internal voice and breaking up the repeated fragment/negation emphasis so the scene reads in plainer, more varied, more Gavin-specific prose.
